questions.q: A study highlighted on May 10, 2026, found that specialized psychotherapy paired with doses of which two psychedelic substances was associated with strong reductions in severe depression?

Discussed heavily by scientists on May 10, 2026, after actor Sam Neill announced his cancer remission, what emerging therapy genetically engineers a patient's own immune cells to fight disease?
